channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: North York toddler fatally falls from apartment, police investigating
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in North York, Ontario, on Sunday when a toddler fell from a high-rise apartment building located at Don Mills Road and Graydon Hall Drive. Emergency services responded prom...

item.title: Sheila Mutundi Plans International Airline in Honour of Raila Odinga
item.description: Kenyan model and entrepreneur Sheila Mutundi, now based in Singapore, has announced plans for Raila Airways, an international airline named in tribute to the late former Prime Minister Raila Odinga. M...

item.title: Government blacklists 52 construction companies amid widespread sector noncompliance
item.description: The Building Industry Bargaining Council (BIBC) has highlighted a serious problem of systemic noncompliance within South Africa’s construction sector following the blacklisting of 52 contractors for f...

item.title: Air India Terminates Over 1,000 Employees for Ethical Violations in Three Years
item.description: Air India has reportedly terminated more than 1,000 employees over the past three years for various ethical breaches, as stated by the airline's CEO, Campbell Wilson. These breaches include smuggling ...

item.title: Rescue centre owl helps raise and rehabilitate hundreds of orphaned owlets in B.C.
item.description: At a wildlife rehabilitation centre in Delta, British Columbia, a great horned owl named Casper has spent more than two decades playing a vital role in raising orphaned owlets. Since arriving at the O...

item.title: Himanta Biswa Sarma Re-elected as Assam Chief Minister Following NDA Victory
item.description: In Assam, the Bharatiya Janata Party-led National Democratic Alliance (NDA) has emerged victorious in the recent Assembly elections, securing a decisive 102 seats out of the 126-member Assembly. Follo...

item.title: Ottawa Charge advance to Walter Cup Final after double-overtime win against Boston Fleet
item.description: The Ottawa Charge have secured a place in the Walter Cup Final for the second consecutive season following a dramatic 4-3 double-overtime victory against the Boston Fleet. Michela Cava scored the deci...

item.title: Ruth Odinga Responds to John Mbadi over Remarks on Odinga Legacy at ODM Meeting
item.description: Kisumu Woman Representative Ruth Odinga has strongly responded to National Treasury CS John Mbadi following alleged attacks on the Odinga name during an ODM meeting in Kilifi on May 4. Mbadi reportedl...

item.title: Barcelona secure second consecutive La Liga title after beating Real Madrid
item.description: Barcelona don show their class as dem beat Real Madrid 2-0 for El Clasico to carry home their second La Liga trophy in a row. The match, wey happen for their newly renovated Spotify Camp Nou, see Marc...

item.title: NBI arrests seven human trafficking suspects and rescues 12 victims in Parañaque
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) has successfully arrested seven individuals linked to human trafficking and rescued twelve victims, including minors and an infant, dur...

item.title: Sara Duterte faces new impeachment complaint; Senate prepares for proceedings
item.description: Sara Duterte, the Vice President of the Philippines, is once again facing an impeachment complaint filed in the House of Representatives. This development places the Senate in a crucial position, as i...

item.title: Delhi launches Rs 3.5 crore initiative to support youths leaving care homes after adulthood
item.description: The Delhi government has recently launched a scheme with a budget of Rs 3.5 crore aimed at supporting children who are leaving care homes after they turn 18. This initiative is intended to help these ...

item.title: Controversial decisions spark calls for review of SA boxing officiating
item.description: South African boxing is once again under scrutiny after a series of contentious officiating decisions. Sinovuyo “Pink One” Mthintelwa lost his provincial flyweight title to Siyamthanda Mbali on April ...

item.title: Victor Osimhen Will Miss Galatasaray’s Season-Ending Match Due To Suspension
item.description: Nigerian striker Victor Osimhen go miss Galatasaray final match of di season against Kasımpaşa because him collect suspension during their 4-2 win over Antalyaspor on Saturday. Dis na him fifth bookin...

item.title: Australian Sharemarket Poised to Slide Amid Rising Oil Prices and Middle East Tensions
item.description: The Australian sharemarket is forecast to open lower on Monday following renewed hostilities between the US and Iran, which have pushed global oil prices above US$100 per barrel. The S&P/ASX 200 Index...

item.title: Landlord Praises Long-Term Tenant for Leaving Apartment in Excellent Condition After 10 Years
item.description: A heartwarming story has gone viral showing a landlord in Staten Island expressing genuine emotion as his tenant of 10 years, identified as Colette, moved out of his property. In a video that circulat...

item.title: Mexican Parents Reunited with Son in Mexico Before His Passing from Cancer
item.description: Kevin González, an 18-year-old U.S. citizen raised in Mexico, was reunited with his parents, Isidoro González Avilés and Norma Anabel Ramírez Amaya, in Durango, Mexico, just a day before he passed awa...

item.title: Ongoing Developments in the Middle East Conflict as of May 11, 2026
item.description: Ang artikulo ay isang live updates page mula sa GMA News na naglalaman ng pinakabagong impormasyon tungkol sa patuloy na tensyon at sigalot sa Middle East noong May 11, 2026. Bagama’t limitado ang det...

item.title: Experiencing Lesbian Motherhood through Reciprocal IVF
item.description: Leah and her partner pursued lesbian motherhood through reciprocal IVF, a process where each partner contributes an egg and carries the other's embryo. Their journey began with the careful selection o...

item.title: Iran Responds to US Peace Proposal as Strait of Hormuz Partially Reopens
item.description: Iran has formally replied to a US proposal aimed at initiating peace talks to end the ongoing conflict, according to Iranian state media. The response, relayed via mediator Pakistan, focused on haltin...
